description: This pipeline merges multiple tables into one, automatically creating columns if they do not exist, and then generates histogram plots from the merged data, producing separate outputs for different types of analyses, including colocalization and comparisons between positive values in STED images.

a1253593-6d21-4db6-a5c9-806adc2cb80d.name: table-merge-tables
a1253593-6d21-4db6-a5c9-806adc2cb80d.description:
Merges multiple tables into one table by merging the list of rows. Columns are automatically created if they do not exist.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of multiple data items. If you want to group all data into one output, set the matching strategy to 'Custom' and leave 'Data set matching annotations' empty.

d1da9670-724a-49fe-bf42-86e13448c07c.name: plot-table:plot-histogram
d1da9670-724a-49fe-bf42-86e13448c07c.description: Plots the incoming table(s). This node will create a JFreeChart Histogram plot.

4769c1bd-3073-4d7f-a209-18a2083a705f.name: plot-table:plot-histogram
4769c1bd-3073-4d7f-a209-18a2083a705f.description: Plots the incoming table(s). This node will create a JFreeChart Histogram plot.
